---
title: "My awesome SciPy presentation"
author: "Your name"
date: 2026-07-14
format:
  revealjs:
    embed-resources: true
---

# Introduction

## Slide 1

This is some text.

```{python}
#| echo: true
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
```

## Slide 2

This is more text.

```{python}
#| echo: true
data = {"x": range(1, 11), "y": np.random.randn(10)}
print(data)
```
